architecture.summary: Config consolidation: umbrella+multiProject→workspace. Remove boolean flags. repos array IS the config.

integrations.summary: Per-repo sync targets (github/jira/ado). Import maps to workspace repos. Sync-setup walkthrough per repo.

ui-ux.summary: Dashboard workspace page with mapping table. Init flow explains umbrella concept. Sync-setup wizard.

performance.summary: No perf concerns — config migration is one-time, no runtime impact.

security.summary: Credentials stay in .env, not config. No new security surfaces.

edge-cases.summary: Backward compat for old configs. Single-project = workspace with 0-1 repos. Empty repos array valid.
